visuals.title: Shared-Memory Architecture (UMA)
visuals.description: Visual diagram for shared vs distributed
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Shared-Memory vs Distributed-Memory</text>
  
  <!-- Shared Memory System -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="120" height="180" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Shared Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Processors in Shared Memory -->
  <circle cx="90" y="130" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="90" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    P1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="150" y="130" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="150" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    P2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="90" y="180" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="90" y="183" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    P3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="150" y="180" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="150" y="183" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    P4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Access Lines -->
  <line x1="90" y1="145" x2="90" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="150" y1="145" x2="150" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Distributed Memory System -->
  <rect x="240" y="60" width="120" height="180" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Distributed Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Nodes in Distributed Memory -->
  <rect x="255" y="120" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    N1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="315" y="120" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    N2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="255" y="180" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    N3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="315" y="180" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    N4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Network Connections -->
  <line x1="285" y1="150" x2="315" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="285" y1="150" x2="285" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="285" y1="180" x2="315" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="255" y1="180" x2="285" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="120" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Single Shared Address Space
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="300" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Message Passing Network
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
